title: Quality Assurance Procedure for automatic sun/sky/lunar photometers
author: CARS
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: These procedures apply to the ACTRIS aerosol remote sensing National Facilities and to the AERONET-ACTRIS associated photometer stations.
steps_raw: These procedures apply to the ACTRIS aerosol remote sensing National Facilities and to the AERONET-ACTRIS associated photometer stations.
